sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ امْرَأَةٌ صَالِحَةٌ تُكْثِرُ مِنَ الصَّلَاةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Bogobojazna žena je mnogo donošila salavat na Poslanika.
sentences.translationEn: A righteous woman often sent blessings upon the Prophet.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَقُولُهَا حِينَ تَسْمَعُ اسْمَهُ الشَّرِيفَ.
sentences.translation: Govorila bi ga kad bi čula njegovo plemenito ime.
sentences.translationEn: She would say it when she heard his noble name.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لِابْنَتِهَا: مَنْ صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ صَلَاةً صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ عَشْرًا.
sentences.translation: Rekla je kćerki: Ko jednom donese salavat, Allah će mu dati deset.
sentences.translationEn: She told her daughter: Whoever blesses him once God blesses him ten times.

sentences.translation: Kćerka je naučila i počela raditi isto kao ona.
sentences.translationEn: The daughter learned and started doing the same.
